source: R vcd::Arthritis — Koch & Edwards 1988 rheumatoid arthritis RCT; 84 patients stratified by age group (<55 vs >=55)
notes: Control study: treatment advantage holds across both young and old patient strata. Age confounds the magnitude (older patients have better placebo response) but not the direction. Companion to rdatasets-arthritis-treatment-sex — same RCT, different stratification variable, same conclusion: no paradox.
